name: Kwame Asante
title: Operations Analyst
summary: Ops analyst who turns messy processes into documented, automated workflows. Built a vendor onboarding tracker that cut cycle time by 40%. Comfortable writing SQL to pull his own data and never waits on a BI ticket.

highlights: Built vendor onboarding tracker in Asana + SQL that reduced average cycle time from 18 to 11 days
Owns SLA compliance reporting for 40+ vendor relationships, reviewed weekly by VP of Ops
Documented 25 previously undocumented processes — now used for team onboarding
Managed daily order operations reconciliation for $8M/month of merchandise
Built Power BI dashboards reducing weekly ops reporting from 4 hours to 20 minutes
